calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-06-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (212)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2009 Off Calendar

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Feb-25-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

George B. Altenberg, Jr., appeared with petiitoner Abraham Murguia, who was present as Guardian Ad Litem for the minor Cain Murguia, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner and the minor were placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $7,500.00.
Attorney's Fees - $1,875.00.
Medical Expenses - $3,023.00.
Costs - $212.74.

The net balance of $2,389.26 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Redwood Credit Union, located on McDowell Boulevard, Petaluma, CA. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.
